QA-08 -001 MEDIUM P2
Failed: Test qa08 homepage renders at mobile 375
https://dev.mehadedu.com/en test_qa08_homepage_renders_at_mobile_375 2026-06-09 04:15:15 1.03s
What this test was checking
Homepage must render without horizontal overflow at 375px width — verified against https://dev.mehadedu.com/en.
Test data used
BASE_URL
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open a browser and go to https://dev.mehadedu.com/en
  2. Open the page on a mobile-sized viewport (≤ 414px wide)
  3. Observe the result: it does NOT match what the test expected (see Actual Behavior)
What should happen
Homepage must render without horizontal overflow at 375px width.
What actually happened
Horizontal scroll detected at mobile 375px — layout broken
Proof of Concept — Screenshot
Proof of Concept — Screen Recording

QA-08 -002 HIGH P1
Failed: Test qa08 login modal usable on mobile
https://dev.mehadedu.com/en test_qa08_login_modal_usable_on_mobile 2026-06-09 04:15:15 17.60s
What this test was checking
Login modal must open and show phone input at 375px — verified against https://dev.mehadedu.com/en.
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open a browser and go to https://dev.mehadedu.com/en
  2. Click the 'Log In' button in the page header
  3. Open the page on a mobile-sized viewport (≤ 414px wide)
  4. Observe the result: it does NOT match what the test expected (see Actual Behavior)
What should happen
Login modal must open and show phone input at 375px.
What actually happened
The test tried to click a button, but the button never became clickable within 15000ms. Often this means the button is hidden or covered by another element.
Proof of Concept — Screenshot
Proof of Concept — Screen Recording
Download .webm

E          - element is outside of the viewport
E     - retrying click action
E       - waiting 500ms
